3124740.name: Text Wall
3124740.description:
can you match blocks? can you type? can you type while you match blocks? how fast can you type while you match blocks?

what level can you reach before the board falls to the bottom? as the level increases so does the speed that the board falls. you must type and match blocks fast enough to prevent the board from reaching the bottom. you can also gain special items that you can use to buy yourself more time or eliminate blocks that might be difficult to match. make sure you hit the correct keys though, mistakes will cost you.

practice your typing skills while playing an addictive puzzle game. see what level you can reach and how high you can get your score.
